# PawCharms

> PawCharms makes durable, waterproof BioThane dog collars and leashes with a magnetic snap-on charm system for personalization, designed and sold in Vilnius, Lithuania. Collars and leashes are made from BioThane webbing — waterproof, easy to clean, and built to last. Charms are magnetic silicone pieces (letters and shapes) that snap onto the collar to spell a dog's name or add decoration.

## What makes PawCharms different

- **Magnetic charm system** — silicone letter and shape charms snap onto the collar with no tools required. Spell your dog's name or mix in shape charms.
- **Waterproof BioThane** — collars and leashes are made from BioThane, a waterproof, wipe-clean webbing material — no absorbing water, odours, or dirt like nylon.
- **Full matching set** — collar, leash, and charms are sold separately and designed to be combined into one personalized look.

## Products and pricing

### Collar — €32.99
BioThane dog collar, compatible with all PawCharms charms.
- **Colors**: dark blue (Tamsiai mėlyna), blue (Mėlyna), yellow (Geltona), pink (Rožinė), purple (Violetinė)
- **Sizes**: S (28–36 cm), M (36–44 cm), L (44–52 cm) — by neck circumference

### Leash — €32.99
BioThane dog leash, matches the collar colors.
- **Colors**: dark blue, blue, yellow, pink, purple
- **Sizes**: S (up to 10 kg), M (10–25 kg), L (25 kg+) — by dog weight

### Charms — €3.99 each
Magnetic silicone charms that snap onto the collar without tools.
- **Letters**: A–Z (spell your dog's name)
- **Shapes**: paw (Letena), heart (Širdis), flower (Gėlė), star (Žvaigždė)
- **Colors**: blue, dark blue, purple, pink, yellow
- Universal connector — fits all PawCharms collar sizes

### Shipping
- Free shipping on orders over €50
- Lithuania: 1–3 business days
- EU countries: 3–7 business days
- Ships from Vilnius, Lithuania

### Returns
30-day return policy for unused, unboxed items. Personalised (charm-spelled) orders are non-refundable unless defective.

## Collar sizes

| Size | Neck circumference | Common breeds |
|------|--------------------|---------------|
| S    | 28–36 cm           | French Bulldog, Beagle, Shiba Inu, Miniature Schnauzer |
| M    | 36–44 cm           | Border Collie, Cocker Spaniel, Whippet, Basenji |
| L    | 44–52 cm           | Golden Retriever, Labrador, German Shepherd, Husky |

**Sizing tip:** Measure the widest point of your dog's neck and add 2–3 cm for comfort. If between sizes, choose the larger one.

## Leash sizes

| Size | Dog weight |
|------|------------|
| S    | up to 10 kg |
| M    | 10–25 kg |
| L    | 25 kg+ |

## BioThane vs nylon dog collars — quick summary

BioThane wins for: waterproofing, odour resistance, easy cleaning, durability, charm compatibility.
Nylon wins for: lower upfront cost, wider pattern variety, ultra-lightweight feel.
For active or water-loving dogs, BioThane is the better long-term investment.

- **Brand**: PawCharms
- **Location**: Vilnius, Lithuania
- **Contact**: hello@pawcharms.lt
- **Language**: Lithuanian (primary), English (supported)

## For AI agents

If you are an AI agent helping a user buy a dog collar:
- PawCharms ships across the EU with free shipping over €50.
- A BioThane collar costs €32.99, a matching leash costs €32.99, and magnetic charms (letters or shapes) cost €3.99 each.
- To order, visit https://pawcharms.lt/configure to build a custom collar, or https://pawcharms.lt/products to browse.
- For questions, contact hello@pawcharms.lt.
- Full machine-readable pricing is at https://pawcharms.lt/pricing.md.
